description: Letter to Yosef b. Ya’aqov b. Awkal, Fustat. It seems that there was a deep argument between the writer and a group of merchants after some money did not get to its destination. During the argument, there was a document from an Islamic court that was presented. This document had to do with cinnamon and other spices. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #203) VMR
description_he: מכתב ליוסף בן יעקב בן אוקאל, פוסטאט, על ויכוח חריף בין הכותב לסוחרים לאחר שכסף לא הגיע ועל קינמון ותבלינים
